parameters.description: Restrict search to one result family.

get.summary: Search across tenant projects, tasks, files, people, teams, workspaces, and messages

info.title: TaskBricks Enterprise API
info.description: NestJS API for the TaskBricks Enterprise work management platform.

bearer.description: Use the accessToken returned by /api/v1/auth/login or /api/v1/auth/register.

value.description: Optional caller-provided secret. A generated secret is used when omitted.

refreshToken.description: Deprecated for browsers. Refresh tokens are issued in an HttpOnly cookie.

trustedDeviceToken.description: Deprecated for browsers. Trusted-device tokens are issued in an HttpOnly cookie.

token.description: Opaque verification token from the email link
Opaque invite token from the invitation email

trustedDeviceToken.description: Trusted-device token issued after a remembered MFA login

refreshToken.description: Refresh token for non-browser clients. Browser clients use the HttpOnly refresh cookie.

token.description: Opaque password reset token from the reset email

description.example: Can manage delivery work across projects
Can manage delivery work across projects

title.example: Use Cloudinary for user profile uploads
Use Cloudinary for user profile uploads

toAddresses.description: Internal mailbox addresses or aliases to deliver to.

ccAddresses.description: Internal mailbox addresses or aliases to copy.

bccAddresses.description: Internal mailbox addresses or aliases to blind copy.

toAddresses.description: Internal mailbox addresses or aliases to deliver to.

ccAddresses.description: Internal mailbox addresses or aliases to copy.

bccAddresses.description: Internal mailbox addresses or aliases to blind copy.

version.description: Optional optimistic concurrency version from the last live notes payload.

scope.description: Attachment scope such as TASK, PROJECT, CHAT, DOCUMENT, WORKFLOW, or OMOFLOW.

entityType.description: Entity type this upload will be attached to, such as TASK, PROJECT, CONVERSATION, MESSAGE, DOCUMENT, or WORKFLOW_RUN.

events.description: Event names. Use * to receive all events.

secret.description: Optional caller-provided secret; generated when omitted

idempotencyKey.description: Optional idempotency key for action-producing prompts
